name: tmux-tools
description: Worker-pane patterns for Synaps agents inside tmux. Spawn named side panes, drive long-running commands, capture streaming output, hand control back to the user when interactive input is needed (sudo, prompts). Includes `synaps.sh` for driving the Synaps `/plugins` TUI from a side pane (refresh / install / update / sync). Auto-suggested when $TMUX is detected.
